summary: Project involves a presentation/landing page with a cover page, Instagram QR code, and an Admin panel. User wants the cover page tagline updated to 'Transforming Blank Walls into Meaningful Art' and the Instagram QR code updated to the one from the second image.
known_issues: Admin panel login is currently experiencing issues
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Orange-to-pink gradient dot-style Instagram QR code with Instagram camera logo in centre and '@KHUDRANGKALAKAAR' label in bold pink text at the bottom (instagram-qr-khudrangkalakaar.dim_600x650.png)

existing_features.title: Fix the Admin Panel login flow in AdminLogin.tsx. The login button currently gets stuck in 'Initializing...' state and shows 'Please complete authentication in the popup...' without proceeding. The login should validate the hardcoded credentials and then trigger Internet Identity authentication cleanly, allowing the admin to successfully reach the Admin Panel. Ensure the button state resets properly if authentication fails or is cancelled.
Update the hero/cover page tagline in HeroSection.tsx to read 'Transforming Blank Walls into Meaningful Art.' replacing the current tagline text.

Replace the dynamically generated QR code in QRSection.tsx with a static image of the official @KHUDRANGKALAKAAR Instagram QR code (the orange/pink gradient QR code with the Instagram logo in the center and '@KHUDRANGKALAKAAR' label, as provided in the uploaded second image). Display this static image asset instead of the programmatically generated QR code.
